text.title: API Error Handling Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: ERR-PUBLIC-API-V1 documents 2 errors (402 insufficient-funds + 504 upstream-timeout) with stable URIs and traceId.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Public API needs a unified error envelope; existing 500 cluster includes validation errors that should be 400s.

section.title: Output
